summary: Task 3 added source-backed data/RAG/vector coverage from official Milvus, Qdrant, Weaviate, pgvector, and FAISS source notes. Main-environment validators, backend/search visibility, frontend availability, and loop-dashboard health passed. The generator child sandbox later hung while trying service visibility checks, so this task was manually closed out from the main environment.
baseline_dirty_exclusions: pre-existing untracked personal-wiki/domains/ai_infra/raw/crawler/compute-* 20260706 hardware accelerator captures were not used, modified, staged, or declared as task-3 outputs

verify_results.summary: Regenerated personal-wiki/domains/ai_infra/wiki/index.md and indexed Data RAG Vector Infrastructure.
coverage-map.json and loop-state.json satisfy harness schemas and ai_infra coverage timestamp semantics.
Task-3 gap proof parses as JSON.
Task-3 gap proof satisfies the harness gap-proof validator.
No whitespace errors in the current diff.

verify_results.command: targeted credential-shaped sensitive-pattern scan over changed files
verify_results.summary: No credential-shaped findings. A preliminary naive substring scan matched harmless technical words like tokenization and was replaced with credential-shaped patterns.

verify_results.command: autonomous scope check for declared changed paths
verify_results.summary: All declared non-run-artifact changed paths are allowed by the run policy and no manual-confirm paths were required.

verify_results.command: link probe over official Milvus/Qdrant/Weaviate/pgvector/FAISS URLs using urllib HEAD
verify_results.summary: Main-environment curl HEAD probes returned HTTP 200 for Qdrant, Weaviate, pgvector, FAISS README, and FAISS indexes wiki. Milvus returned HTTP 403/challenge to shell probes from the current network, but the official URL was readable through the browser retrieval channel and is recorded in raw source notes.

Main-environment backend health returned ok. Search for 'vector database RAG embedding' and 'Milvus Qdrant Weaviate pgvector FAISS' returned Data RAG Vector Infrastructure and AI Infra Coverage Map results.
Main-environment frontend returned HTTP 200 through Vite on port 5173.
Main-environment Loop Dashboard health returned ok on port 8766.
Declared task-3 paths are present; pre-existing untracked 20260706 compute accelerator crawler captures remain separate baseline-dirty files.

live_service_notes.generator_child_sandbox: The interrupted generator child could not reliably observe local services and hung while closing out its verification; the main environment completed the checks instead.
live_service_notes.backend: http://127.0.0.1:8765/api/health returned ok and /api/search returned the new Data RAG Vector Infrastructure page.
